## [03:03 - 06:05]

that we're going to do in our entire webinar funnel. So what I recommend that you do is that you focused on finding competitive offerings. ## [06:05 - 09:06]

What this does is it gives you pages that have that are about your problem and also contain the word webinar somewhere on that page. And this will allow you if people have done marketing for a webinar and put the word webinar on that page, it'll allow you possibly to be able to find some of these webinars you might not be able to find in a different way. And in these cases I'd like you to list the title of the webinar, the description they're giving of the webinar and the problems that they're solving in that webinar. Oftentimes these are in the bullet points where they're describing what you'll learn on this particular webinar. Now as you go through this process of doing some market research here, I suggest you pay very special attention to the ads that are running. So when you do these searches, what are other people advertising on those searches of the problems that your product and your webinar solved? Now a lot of people get really scared when they see other people advertising and having products about the subject area that they're trying to solve.
